emails.subject: Re: #517518.01
emails.body: Re: #517518.01 I spoke with Mark Fischer about this Tom Alonso stepped out of the office for a minute and he said Tom would probably want to talk to his contact with FPL. So I'm going to wait before changing these counterparty names. I'll also check with him on the off peak hours for 517518, and get back to you in just a minute. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Allen on 02/14/2001 09:21 AM CST

emails.subject: Re: #517518.01
emails.body: Re: #517518.01 517518 and 517520 have been changed to FPL Energy Power Marketing; and Tom's sticking by his price on 517518. Would you mind sending me Jeff Wallace's phone number if you have it? These guys are still busy trading, so I'd like to take care of it myself if I can. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Allen on 02/14/2001 09:21 AM CST

#517518.01 Kate, same thing on this trade. I think it should be FPL Energy Power Marketing b/c I received a confirm on it. Secondly on the confirm it states that hour 0100-0600 is priced at $95.00 and then again at hours 2300-2400. 7-22 is priced at $140. However I do not show in the system 1-6 and 23-24 at $95. Did he forget to put in the off peak or is FPL incorrect. Thanks,
